powers.label: Open INCs
powers.prompt: Query ServiceNow for all open incidents assigned to my workspace's assignment groups. Show a table with: number, priority, short_description, state, age (days since created), and assignment_group. Sort by priority then age.

powers.label: Triage Latest
powers.prompt: Find the most recent open P1 or P2 INC for my team and perform a full 8-section triage analysis using the incident response format.

powers.label: Triage INC...
powers.prompt: Which INC number should I triage? Provide the INC number and I'll perform a full 8-section analysis.

powers.label: P1/P2 Summary
powers.prompt: Query ServiceNow for all P1 and P2 incidents from the last 30 days for my team's assignment groups. Summarize: total count, MTTR, recurring services, resolution patterns.

powers.label: Check All Apps
powers.prompt: Read my catalog index, then for each app that has a health_check.url in its app.yaml, hit the endpoint and report status (HTTP code, response time). Flag any non-200 responses.

powers.label: Error Spike Check
powers.prompt: For each app in my catalog scope that has an error_spl in its app.yaml, run the Splunk query scoped to the last 4 hours. Report any services with elevated error counts (>50 errors).

powers.label: Latency Check
powers.prompt: For each app in my catalog scope that has a latency_spl in its app.yaml, run the query. Report any services with p95 latency above 3 seconds.

powers.label: Check App...
powers.prompt: Which application should I check? I'll read its app.yaml and run health check, Splunk error query, and latency query.

powers.label: List Apps
powers.prompt: Show my managed services catalog index — all apps in scope with BAPP ID, full name, studio, and assignment group in a table.

powers.label: App Details...
powers.prompt: Which application do you want details for? Provide the name or BAPP ID and I'll read its app.yaml showing: repositories, Splunk queries, health checks, CI/CD, contacts, and cloud infrastructure.

powers.label: Runbook...
powers.prompt: Which application's runbook do you need? Provide the name or BAPP ID and I'll read its runbook.md with restart procedures, scaling info, and validation steps.

powers.label: Escalation Matrix
powers.prompt: Show the escalation contacts and routing table for all apps in my scope. Include: primary contact, escalation channel, and reassignment rules per root cause category.

powers.label: Recent CTASKs
powers.prompt: Query ServiceNow for CTASKs related to my applications from the last 14 days. Show: number, short_description, state, scheduled_start_date, assignment_group.

powers.label: Pre-Change Validate
powers.prompt: I'm about to apply a change. Run pre-change stability validation: check current health endpoints, capture baseline error rates from Splunk, and document the current state for comparison.

powers.label: Post-Change Validate
powers.prompt: A change was just applied. Run post-change stability validation: check health endpoints, compare error rates against baseline, verify no new error patterns in Splunk.

powers.label: GSM Report
powers.prompt: Generate a GSM report for my team's applications covering the last 7 days: incident count by priority, MTTR, SLA compliance, top affected services, and trend vs previous week.

powers.label: Weekly Summary
powers.prompt: Summarize this week's sustainment activity: total INCs opened/resolved, P1/P2 count, CTASKs completed, recurring patterns, and recommendations.

powers.label: Monthly Trends
powers.prompt: Analyze incident trends for the last 30 days: volume by week, top 5 affected applications, most common root causes, and SLA breach rate. Include a comparison to the previous month.
